name: Three Bean Tortilla Soup
recipeIngredient: 15 ounces black beans, canned, drained and rinsed
15 ounces navy beans, canned, drained and rinsed
4 corn tortillas, cut in thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F. Heat a small nonstick skillet over medium-high heat until hot. Add tomato and cook, turning occasionally, until the skin is blistered and slightly charred. Cool the tomato slightly, then coarsely chop.
2. Spray a large saucepan with nonstick cooking spray. Add chopped tomato, onion, and garlic to the pan. Cook over medium heat for 3 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add black beans, navy beans, chili beans, and broth; stir well. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
3. Place tortilla strips in an ungreased baking dish. Bake for 5-8 minutes or until crisp.
4. Serve the soup in bowls, topped with the baked tortilla strips.
